title: FOV Limit
description: Allows configuration of the minimum and maximum dynamic fov multipliers.
body:
Allows configuration of the minimum and maximum dynamic fov multipliers.

With FOV Limit, you can increase the minimum dynamic fov multiplier to prevent high slowness effects from making it impossible to see anything.

In order to be lightweight, this mod does not have any dependencies whatsoever.

When this mod is loaded for the first time, it will generate a default configuration in the /config/ folder of your instance. You can then edit your preferences and restart your game to see the changes.

A source repository will be eventually added.
